summary: Coal & Curry is a South Indian multi-cuisine restaurant app being rebuilt. It features a warm South Indian-inspired theme, menu categories (Starters, Dosas, Rice & Biryani, Curries, Breads, Desserts, Drinks), dish cards with images/descriptions/prices, a shopping cart and ordering flow, and restaurant details (contact info, hours, location).
known_issues: Production deployment error encountered during last deploy attempt
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Full-screen South Indian restaurant interior with warm golden lighting and banana leaf table settings, landscape (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
- Crispy golden Masala Dosa served with sambar and three chutneys on a banana leaf (masala-dosa.dim_600x400.png)
- Soft white Idly served with sambar and coconut chutney in a traditional steel plate (idly-sambar.dim_600x400.png)
- Chettinad Pepper Chicken curry in a clay pot with curry leaves and red chilies (chettinad-chicken.dim_600x400.png)
- Aromatic Prawn Biryani garnished with fried onions and mint in a copper handi (prawn-biryani.dim_600x400.png)
- Spicy Fish Curry in a thick coconut-based gravy served with steamed rice (fish-curry.dim_600x400.png)
- Ghee Roast Dosa — paper-thin crispy dosa with ghee drizzle and red chutney (ghee-roast-dosa.dim_600x400.png)
- Medu Vada — golden crispy lentil donuts served with coconut chutney and sambar (medu-vada.dim_600x400.png)
- Onion Uttapam — thick rice pancake topped with onions, tomatoes, and green chilies (onion-uttapam.dim_600x400.png)
- Vegetable Kothu Parotta — shredded parotta stir-fried with vegetables and spices (kothu-parotta.dim_600x400.png)
- Kerala Fish Moilee — delicate white fish in coconut milk curry with green chilies (fish-moilee.dim_600x400.png)
- Sambar Rice — steamed rice mixed with lentil sambar and ghee in a steel bowl (sambar-rice.dim_600x400.png)
- Payasam — creamy South Indian vermicelli kheer with cashews and raisins in a silver bowl (payasam.dim_600x400.png)
- Filter Coffee — frothy South Indian filter coffee in a traditional steel tumbler and dabarah (filter-coffee.dim_600x400.png)
- Fresh Coconut Water served in a tender green coconut with a straw (coconut-water.dim_600x400.png)
- Butter Chicken — rich tomato-cream chicken curry garnished with cream swirl and fenugreek (butter-chicken.dim_600x400.png)
- Plain Parotta — flaky layered flatbread stacked on a banana leaf plate (plain-parotta.dim_600x400.png)
- Mixed Veg Curry — colorful South Indian vegetable curry with mustard seeds and coconut (mixed-veg-curry.dim_600x400.png)
- Coal & Curry restaurant logo — stylized flame over a curry pot with elegant serif text on dark background (logo.dim_400x400.png)
- Offers section banner — festive South Indian food spread with banana leaves and brass lamps (offers-banner.dim_1200x400.png)

existing_features.title: Apply a warm, vibrant South Indian-inspired visual theme throughout the entire app using a rich spice palette (saffron, turmeric, deep red, cream, dark charcoal). Use bold display typography, layered texture backgrounds, and consistent component styling that evokes authentic South Indian dining culture.

Build a complete South Indian multi-cuisine menu with the following categories: Starters, Dosas & Uttapam, Idly & Vada, Rice & Biryani, Curries & Gravies, Breads, Seafood Specials, Desserts, and Drinks. Each category must contain at least 4–6 realistic South Indian dishes with name, description, price (in INR), spice level, and veg/non-veg badge.

Implement horizontally scrollable category tabs on the Menu page so users can filter dishes by category. Each tab should show a relevant emoji and the category name. The active tab should be visually distinct.

Render dish cards on the Menu page with dish image, name, short description, spice level indicator, price, veg/non-veg badge, and an 'Add to Cart' button. Images should use generated dish images stored in frontend/public/assets/generated.

Implement a shopping cart with the ability to add/remove dishes, adjust quantities, and view a subtotal. The cart should persist via localStorage and display item count in the navbar. Include a checkout flow with delivery/takeaway selection, address entry, payment method selection, and an order confirmation screen.

Build a full-screen hero section on the homepage with a South Indian food background image, the restaurant name 'Coal & Curry', a tagline reflecting South Indian multi-cuisine, and CTA buttons linking to the Menu and Reservation pages.

Build a table reservation page with a form for name, phone number, date, time, number of guests, occasion (optional), and seating preference. On successful submission, display a reservation confirmation summary. Store reservations in the Motoko backend.

Add a Signature Dishes section on the homepage showcasing 4 featured South Indian specialties (e.g., Ghee Roast Dosa, Chettinad Pepper Chicken, Prawn Masala, Filter Coffee Dessert Platter) with images, short descriptions, prices, and Add to Cart buttons.

Add a customer reviews section on the homepage that fetches reviews from the Motoko backend (with static fallback data) and displays them in a carousel with star ratings, reviewer name, and review text.

Add SEO metadata to all pages including title, meta description, Open Graph tags, and a JSON-LD Restaurant structured data block on the homepage. Update frontend/public/robots.txt and frontend/public/sitemap.xml to reflect all public routes.

Include a floating chatbot widget ('Agni' assistant) fixed to the bottom-right corner. The chatbot should respond to keywords related to menu, hours, reservation, delivery, location, offers, and payment using pre-written static responses.
Add a responsive Navbar with scroll-aware styling, mobile hamburger menu, cart item count badge, and links to Home, Menu, About, Gallery, Offers, Reservations, Blog, and Contact pages.

Add a site-wide Footer with brand description, social media links, quick navigation links, menu category links, contact details, and a newsletter signup form. Newsletter submissions should be stored in the Motoko backend with duplicate-check feedback.

new_feature_requests.summary: Menu with South Indian multi-cuisine categories and dish cards (images, descriptions, prices)
Restaurant details page with contact info, opening hours, and location

Create a Restaurant Details / Contact page showing the restaurant's name, address, phone number, email, WhatsApp link, opening hours (daily schedule), and social media links. Include a simple contact inquiry form.
